Tailwind Cards

A collection of beautiful card designs

Card 1 - Logo Card

Simple centered card with logo and branding

Card 2 - App Card

App listing card with install button

Card 3 - Product Card

Horizontal layout product showcase card

Card 4 - Glass Card

Glassmorphism effect card design

Card 5 - PW Home

Multi-section page layout

Card 6 - PW Home 2

Alternative homepage design

Card 7 - Tailwind Demo

Core Tailwind showcase page
